pi_items.source: Web search verification - books.toscrape.com is a real, publicly accessible sandbox website designed for web scraping practice. All 20 URLs in the task's URL list are accessible via HTTP 200 responses.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh (lines 42-62) - exactly 20 URLs are written to the landing_pages.txt file, and all 20 URLs verified as accessible
verifier.py line 73 checks '15 <= row_count <= 60', confirming minimum of 15. Aligns with List Mode expectation where 20 input URLs typically produce 15-30 results after deduplication.

DISCREPANCY FOUND: task.json metadata declares max_row_count as 50 (line 23), but verifier.py (line 73) accepts values up to 60 with '15 <= row_count <= 60'. Any row count > 60 causes verifier to fail (line 76-77).

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real data from books.toscrape.com, a real public sandbox website designed for web scraping practice. All 20 target URLs are live and accessible. The task is designed to test Screaming Frog's List Mode functionality with a specific set of 20 URLs from books.toscrape.com categories and product pages. Expected CSV export row count should be between 15-60 rows. There is a metadata inconsistency: task.json declares max_row_count as 50, but the verifier accepts up to 60.
